## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and explore potential collaboration between You.com and GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kady recently joined You.com as CMO, seeking to leverage AI in marketing and differentiate the company](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai uses a sophisticated Content OS with workflow engines, potentially beneficial for You.com](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [You.com's API and deep research capabilities were once superior but have fallen behind competitors](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Significant opportunities exist for partnership, co-marketing, and product improvement between the companies](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

## Topics

### You.com's Current Situation

  - [Kady joined as CMO of You.com, an AI startup](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Company is "confused as hell"; Kady aims to bring order to chaos](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [You.com needs to identify its unique strengths and find a niche to differentiate](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Currently facing challenges competing with Perplexity and Glean](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Capabilities

  - [70-person company with a sophisticated Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Uses workflow engines represented in code, distilled from expert processes](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Leverages various APIs (including You.com and Perplexity) for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Runs millions of workflow activities monthly, covering various use cases (e.g., hiring, content creation)](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### You.com's Past Strengths and Current Challenges

  - [Previously excelled in deep research capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [API usage hindered by lack of dashboard and consumption tracking](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Perplexity has improved faster, overtaking You.com in some areas](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Opportunity to refocus on knowledge work and transparency in data access](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [GrowthX as a partner for feedback and insights on API usage](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Co-marketing opportunities and potential product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Exploring SEO strategies through automated page creation](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Leveraging GrowthX's connections with other tech companies (e.g., Webflow, Reddit, Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Marcel's Insights for You.com

  - [Focus on improving deep researcher capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Create viral loops with page creation](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Open up data for brands, providing visibility into generative answer rankings](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Position as a more transparent AI platform, especially for knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a deeper workshop with Kady, Vish (COO), and Alper (API business lead) from You.com, and Marcel and CTO from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Set up a separate coffee meeting for Kady and Marcel to discuss You.com's direction](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Kady to attend Marcel's dinner event on the 25th at Lamar](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Explore potential partnership opportunities once You.com's financial constraints ease](https://fathom.video/share/1-KVcoN_wBstvxfz-Z7ipmvxt4-PRNzW?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
